title: White House and Anthropic hold 'productive' meeting amid fears over Mythos model
description: The discussion is a sign the AI firm's technology may be too critical for even the US government to do without.
content:
The White House has said it had a "productive and constructive" meeting with the head of artificial intelligence firm Anthropic, which is suing the US Department of Defense.
The meeting comes a week after the firm released its Claude Mythos preview, ... [2768 chars]

title: Pregnancy vaccine reduces baby hospital admissions for RSV by 80%
description: A study confirms the vaccine gives excellent protection for babies against life-threatening chest infections.
content:
A vaccine during pregnancy which protects newborns against nasty chest infections is cutting hospital admissions of babies by more than 80%, UK health officials say.
A virus, called RSV, affects many babies in the first few months of life and can lea... [3275 chars]

title: One in three young men now live with their parents, ONS data shows
description: Last year, the highest proportion of men aged 20-34 were still living at home since at least 2007 as the rising cost of living takes hold.
content:
More than one in three young men in the UK were living with their parents in 2025, up from 26% in 2000, according to data from the Office for National Statistics (ONS).
The data shows 35% of young men aged 20-35 were living with their parents - more ... [2563 chars]

title: Forgotten British dishes - and the home cooks reviving them
description: Carrageen pudding and Bedfordshire clangers might no longer be household staples, but some home chefs are bringing them back.
content:
Ever heard of carrageen pudding? No? Neither had food content creator Annie Mae Herring until a few weeks ago.
"It was awful," says the 33-year-old from Essex. "It was a soggy welly, with, like, Fairy Liquid and a bit of salt."

title: Orbán's era was over in a flash and Hungary's next PM is a man in a hurry
description: Péter Magyar and his Tisza party are wasting no time preparing for the transfer of power after their dramatic landslide victory.
content:
Péter Magyar and his victorious Tisza party have wasted no time preparing for the transfer of power in Hungary after their dramatic landslide defeat of Viktor Orbán last Sunday.
